variants: Jamila Roquette was born in Garnetwing Hollow and has made her home in Everbrook Hollow. She is recognized for her contributions to technology with the invention called the Hazelvine Compression Table. In honor of her achievements, she received the Grand Aster Crest, a prestigious award in her field. Additionally, Jamila is an active member of the Xanadu Mapmakers, a society dedicated to exploration and cartography. Her work continues to inspire many in her community.
